entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_WallPipeRunLayered_A
entries.visualUse: Three-depth pipe run with flanges, brackets, rivets, valve wheel, and elbow silhouettes.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_WallPipeRunLayered_B
entries.visualUse: Longer offset pipe run with extra elbow breaks and alternating copper/brass material rhythm.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_WallPipeRunLayered_C
entries.visualUse: Compact staggered run for narrow corridor alcoves.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_BoilerTankColumn_A
entries.visualUse: Tall riveted pressure column with domed nodes, gauge, side pipe, and wet soot cards.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_BoilerTankColumn_B
entries.visualUse: Slim vertical boiler column variant with copper collar rings.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_GaugeCluster_Triple_A
entries.visualUse: Three pressure dials with individual needles, rims, bracket plate, and tiny steam pipes.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_GaugeCluster_Quad_B
entries.visualUse: Four-dial inspection station with deeper stacked rims.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_CagedGaslight_Long_A
entries.visualUse: Warm amber glass cylinder surrounded by separate ring and rod cage geometry.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_CagedGaslight_Short_B
entries.visualUse: Short wall lamp with thick brass rings and glass highlight cards.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_ValveBank_Triple_A
entries.visualUse: Three valve wheels mounted over a riveted plate with short pipe stubs.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_ValveBank_Quad_B
entries.visualUse: Four-wheel valve manifold with red enamel accents.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_Handrail_Riveted_A
entries.visualUse: Riveted brass handrail with posts, wall brackets, and dark shadow backing.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_Handrail_Riveted_B
entries.visualUse: Short handrail module for alcoves and door approaches.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_CeilingPipeCluster_A
entries.visualUse: Multi-depth overhead pipe cluster with elbow drops and yoke brackets.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_CeilingPipeCluster_B
entries.visualUse: Compact overhead service bundle with staggered pipe diameters.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_FloorDrainGrate_Long_A
entries.visualUse: Long drainage grate with raised brass rim and dense iron comb bars.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_FloorDrainGrate_Square_B
entries.visualUse: Square drain module for room intersections.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_DoorThresholdTrim_A
entries.visualUse: Layered threshold trim with copper wear edges, rivets, and central gear-like ring.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_DoorThresholdTrim_B
entries.visualUse: Narrow door sill/side trim variant.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_WetSootDetailCards_A
entries.visualUse: Transparent soot, oil streak, and glass highlight cards for adding grime over room shells.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_CornerPipeJunction_A
entries.visualUse: Vertical/horizontal corner transition with elbows, flanges, and clamp brackets.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_WallSteamVentFinned_A
entries.visualUse: Finned brass wall vent with layered slats and soot card.

entries.name: SCDHF11_PREFAB_PressureManifold_Large_A
entries.visualUse: Large pressure manifold mixing tanks, gauge, wheel, pipe branches, and visual depth.
